notes: Minimal 5-declaration file constructing the Verschiebung pullback V* as pi*^{-1} composed with [q]* restricted to Im(pi*), parametric on a Session 3 inclusion witness. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides, no proofs over 30 lines. All declarations are consumed by downstream files (IsDual.lean and OpenLemmaPrimitives.lean).
